plan_review_notes: Approve the planning scope: produce a repository automation spec that defines triggers, actions, safety limits, mobile operator flows, and phased implementation for phone-first operation.

plan_review_history.notes: Revised this planning task to a concrete deliverable: document a phone-first automation model for Sisyphus, anchored to current discord/service/workflow/api seams, with Discord as the MVP mobile surface and the bundled remote session bridge as an optional drill-down path.
Approve the planning scope: produce a repository automation spec that defines triggers, actions, safety limits, mobile operator flows, and phased implementation for phone-first operation.

spec_review_notes: Freeze scope to the planning deliverable only: add the phone-first automation spec doc, link it from README, and align task docs/verification with that repository planning output.
verify_commands: cd ../../.. && rg -n "def run_discord_bot|def run_service_step|def request_task|def run_workflow_cycle" src/taskflow/discord_bot.py src/taskflow/service.py src/taskflow/api.py src/taskflow/workflow.py

last_verify_results.name: cd ../../.. && rg -n "def run_discord_bot|def run_service_step|def request_task|def run_workflow_cycle" src/taskflow/discord_bot.py src/taskflow/service.py src/taskflow/api.py src/taskflow/workflow.py
last_verify_results.command: cd ../../.. && rg -n "def run_discord_bot|def run_service_step|def request_task|def run_workflow_cycle" src/taskflow/discord_bot.py src/taskflow/service.py src/taskflow/api.py src/taskflow/workflow.py

normal_cases.name: The spec clearly describes the phone-first operator loop and names the primary mobile surface.
The spec defines a practical MVP that can be built on the current codebase.

edge_cases.name: The spec explains how deep drill-down works without making it mandatory for routine monitoring.
The spec distinguishes read-only notifications from write-capable automation actions.

exception_cases.name: The spec explicitly excludes unsafe or out-of-scope automation behavior.
The spec does not assume a hosted database or brand-new native app for MVP.

verification_methods.target: The spec clearly describes the phone-first operator loop and names the primary mobile surface.
The spec defines a practical MVP that can be built on the current codebase.
verification_methods.method: manual review against src/taskflow/discord_bot.py, src/taskflow/service.py, src/taskflow/workflow.py, src/taskflow/api.py

verification_methods.target: The spec explains drill-down, safety scope, and out-of-scope behavior correctly.
verification_methods.method: manual review against cc/commands/session/session.tsx and cc/hooks/useRemoteSession.ts

verification_methods.target: The repository points readers to the new spec.
